to: make a section 8 order with respect to the child

conditions.text: in any family proceedings in which a question arises with respect to the welfare of any child

to: apply for a section 8 order with respect to any child

conditions.text: the person is entitled to apply for a section 8 order with respect to the child or has obtained the leave of the court to make the application

to: apply for a child arrangements order

conditions.text: the person is a local authority foster parent and the child has lived with him for a period of at least one year immediately preceding the application

to: apply for a child arrangements order

conditions.text: the child has lived with the relative for a period of at least one year immediately preceding the application

to: have particular regard to certain factors

conditions.text: deciding whether or not to grant leave for a person who is not the child to make an application for a section 8 order

to: be satisfied that the child has sufficient understanding to make the proposed application

conditions.text: the person applying for leave to make an application for a section 8 order is the child concerned
